reviews.review_description: Did Mario and Gtag have a perfect baby? Awnser: yes they did. This game is peak and you must download it. There is only 5 levels as of writing this, but they were really fun. There is a bunch of little puzzles and gimmicks that you have to get around, as also just being a good platformer. I am going to start making yt vids on this game only because of the sheer fun and effort they put into this game. 10/10 for sure recommend!

Just came back from beating the game...


This is such a great game, the mechanics like climbing, pushing buttons and more are actually pretty good, I was not expecting much at first but when I tried it... I can see how this game is perfect, there were hard parts here and there but overall a great game.

10/10

Banjovr
This game is basically like mario mixed with gorilla tag, the mechanics are really fun, and if they add more levels and maybe a boss fight, it would be even more peaks than it is (it is peak).

This might be one of the best gorilla tag fangames I’ve played. The graphics are extremely charming and make you feel like you’re in a Mario game. The movement is in that sweet spot where it’s not too bouncy but you don’t feel super heavy. I would definitely recommend you go check it out!

reviews.review_title: greatest game of my life's last hour!!!!
reviews.review_description: If the devs of this game are not aware of the game stilts, which seems unlikely,  you should spend an hour in there and notice how you go from barely mobile to having high levels of satisfaction over completed jumps and successfully maneuvered obstacles in that game. I don't know whose game came first but I'm assuming these devs or at least aware of the game they may or may not have copied insufficiently. Of the two teams, i would guess that you guys are copycats, solely based on the sprite and textures in this game that Nintendo of America would describe as 'Hey WTF!'  If you did copy stilts, copy stilts better.  There is potential in this but right now that game is crapping in your lunch.  StiltS is relatively lacking on content right now, and I couldn't bring myself to play enough of yours to know how that compares, but it does leave an avenue for not just success but domination.  I'd immediately go rip those guys off so hard if I were you.  The mechanics of stilts is good enough that a new genre is existing because of it and games like it and I think you should allow yourself to freedom to do like everyone else is going to do and rip it off free of inhibitions.  Go crazy.  And at that point the content will decide to winner.  But right now the mechanics do and honestly you all have brought much shame to your family.  All jokes aside I think you got something here.  Keep at it
It’s just better than any vr game I’ve ever played, I could literally die right now, I have seen it all, I can NOT wait for world 2! The music is so calm and catchy, I love it so much!

Much like two of my favourite games - No More Rainbows and Stilt - Leapers combines Gorilla Tag movement with the jump'n'run gameplay of classical titles like the Super Mario series. 
The big advantage of Leapers is, that you can play the main levels, collect coins and (the more hidden) stars together with your friends.
My daughter joined me yesterday, and we had so much fun.
Cannot recommend this game enough.
Actually can't believe that it's free. Where can I donate?  😀
The game has chickens so its automatically a 5 star game
I love this game so much I love the capability of the game
